mapper.select: SELECT p.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone FROM promoter p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.promoter_id = #{promoterId}
SELECT p.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone FROM promoter p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT p.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone FROM promoter p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.approval_status = #{status} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM promoter WHERE approval_status = #{status}

SELECT p.*, m.email AS member_email, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone FROM promoter p JOIN member m ON p.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE promoter SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, approved_by = #{approvedBy}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, approved_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE promoter_id = #{promoterId}
